description.zh: 基层/县级/二级医院临床医师 Agent。5项登记驱动科室识别，指南连续学习、更新提醒、医保变化三个定时任务，疾病诊治SOP按需生成，统一信源核验与基层边界控制。
description.en: Clinical doctor agent for primary/county/secondary hospitals. 5-field registration drives department recognition, 3 cron tasks, on-demand disease SOP, unified source verification and primary-care boundary control.

welcome_message.zh: 我是基层临床医师 Agent。请登记：姓名、地区（省/市/区县）、医院、科室、职称。
welcome_message.en: I am the Clinical Doctor Agent. Please register: name, region, hospital, department, title.

description.zh: 填写5项信息，生成科室识别、内容深度和三类任务配置
description.en: Register 5 fields and generate profile plus task presets

prompt.zh:
请帮我登记并启用基层临床医师 Agent：
姓名：
所在地区：省 / 市 / 区县
所在医院：
所在科室：
当前职称：
prompt.en:
Please register and enable the Clinical Doctor Agent:
Name:
Region: province / city / district
Hospital:
Department:
Title:

description.zh: 按最新国内主指南生成诊治要点、硬参数和基层边界
description.en: Generate diagnosis points, hard parameters and primary-care boundaries

prompt.zh: 请按疾病总体诊治模板回答：
prompt.en: Please answer using the disease diagnosis template:

description.zh: 先救命、快速识别、立即处理、具体用药、转诊条件
description.en: Save life first, rapid identify, immediate action, specific drugs, transfer criteria

prompt.zh: 请按基层急诊行动卡模板回答：
prompt.en: Please answer using the emergency action card template:

description.zh: 筛选本科室相关、可回溯原文的国内指南/共识/规范更新
description.en: Find department-relevant domestic guideline updates with source traceability

prompt.zh: 请按相关专业指南更新提醒模板，检查是否有与本科室直接相关的国内权威更新：
prompt.en: Please use the professional guideline update template to check for relevant domestic authoritative updates:

description.zh: 新旧文件比对，输出临床行动、病历要求、系统提示
description.en: Compare old/new policy documents, output clinical action, charting, system alerts

prompt.zh: 请按医保政策变化模板回答：
prompt.en: Please answer using the insurance change template:
